creator: tomefrom@list.ru
text:
Today I have fetched new ports index file and found different dovecot2 version in ports and index. The same problem with phpmyadmin and other ports.

/usr/ports#make -n fetchindex
/usr/bin/env fetch -am -o /usr/ports/INDEX-8.bz2 http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/INDEX-8.bz2 


#grep dovecot-2 INDEX-8
dovecot-2.1.10...

#cat /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2/distinfo
..dovecot-2.1.12.tar.gz.....
